sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70332" key="neoploutopo/nhros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεο-πλουτοπόνηρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n70332.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wicked from new-gotten wealth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:208" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">208</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
